agribalyse.name_en: Yogurt, fermented milk or dairy specialty, plain
agribalyse.name_fr: Yaourt, lait fermenté ou spécialité laitière, nature

ingredients_text: Yogur natural azucarado (82%) [Leche pasteurizada, nata pasteurizada, azúcar (8%), proteinas de la leche, leche en polvo desnatada y fermentos lácticos]y Preparado de fresa (18%) [trozos de fresa (65%), azúcar, agua, espesantes (almidón modificado de maíz, pectinas y goma xantana), correctores de acidez (citratos de sodio y ácido citrico), colorante (carminas) y aroma],
ingredients_text_en: sugary natural yogurt (82%) [pasteurized milk, pasteurized cream, sugar (8%), milk proteins, skim milk powder and lactic ferments] and strawberry preparation (18%) [strawberry chunks (65%), sugar, water, thickeners (modified corn starch, pectins and xanthan gum), acidity correctors (sodium citrates and citric acid), dye (carmines) and aroma],
